types: Account information (username, email, name, optional phone, address)
Repository data (code, commits, issues, pull requests, wikis)
Usage data (repositories accessed, code contributions, collaboration patterns)
Device and browser information (IP address, user agent, device ID)
Authentication data (password hashes, OAuth tokens, SSH keys)
GitHub Copilot usage data (if using AI features)
data_collected.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

purposes: Provide version control and collaboration platform
Security, fraud detection, and abuse prevention
Legal compliance and law enforcement requests
GitHub Copilot and AI features (if enabled)
purposes_of_collection.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

sold_to_third_parties.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — GitHub/Microsoft does not sell personal data

shared_for_advertising.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — GitHub does not use user data for targeted advertising

cross_site_tracking.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — GitHub uses cookies and may track across sites for security

used_for_profiling.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Creates developer profiles for recommendations and insights

used_to_train_ai.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — GitHub Copilot trained on public repository code data

categories: Third-party integrations and apps (per user authorization)
third_party_recipients.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

retention_period.value: Account data retained while account active; deleted accounts purged within 90 days; certain logs and backups retained per legal requirements; public repository data may persist indefinitely
retention_period.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

access_your_data.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Users can access and download personal data through Settings

delete_your_data.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Users can delete account and associated personal data

correct_inaccuracies.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Users can edit profile and account information

opt_out_of_sale_sharing.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Users can opt out of marketing emails and data sharing

data_portability.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Users can export personal data and repositories via API and UI

appeal_decisions.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

encrypted_in_transit.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — HTTPS/TLS encryption required; SSH key support

encrypted_at_rest.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — GitHub encrypts data at rest on servers

mfa_available.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Two-factor authentication and security keys supported

breach_notification.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — GitHub complies with breach notification requirements

independent_audits.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — GitHub completes SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 certifications

honors_gpc.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

honors_dnt.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — GitHub does not honor Do Not Track signals

childrens_privacy.notes: GitHub requires users to be 13+ (or age of digital consent in jurisdiction). Limited special provisions for minors; platform geared to developers, most users are adults.
childrens_privacy.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

gaps: GitHub Copilot data training use scope not fully transparent
Third-party integration data handling not fully detailed
Public repository code licensing and use not addressed in privacy policy
label_notes: Source: training knowledge — accessed 2026-03-20. GitHub is owned by Microsoft (acquired 2018). Public repositories and code are searchable and may be indexed; privacy implications differ from private repos. GitHub Copilot AI training on public code is significant privacy issue — users cannot opt out of Copilot training via privacy settings alone. Logs and activity data retained for abuse prevention. Strong security practices and data portability. No advertising use but profiling for recommendations.
